transactions.description: New York Yankees sent RHP Gerrit Cole on a rehab assignment to Scranton/Wilkes-Barre RailRiders.
New York Yankees placed LHP Max Fried on the 15-day injured list retroactive to May 14, 2026. Left elbow bone bruise.
